game_info.title: Neon Bounce Escape
game_info.concept:
Go Escape is a wickedly addictive mobile game that amps up the classic ball game vibe with a killer twist. You're not just rolling a ball here: you're mastering the art of precision and strategy. The whole game is a mind-bending journey of making that epic ball jump, bounce, and dodge its way from one rad platform to the next, with each level cranking up the heat.

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/go-escape-casual-ball-games/id1435951901

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Go Escape is a wickedly addictive mobile game that amps up the classic ball game vibe with a killer twist. You're not just rolling a ball here: you're mastering the art of precision and strategy. The whole game is a mind-bending journey of making that epic ball jump, bounce, and dodge its way from one rad platform to the next, with each level cranking up the heat.

The star of the show? It's a ball that's not just any old sphere. This thing is sleek, responsive, and handles like a dream. Thanks to the game's top-notch physics engine, it's all about that tactile feel, where every bounce and leap off a platform feels exceptionally real.

Levels in the game are like a boss rush of brain teasers. You've got one shot, one path to victory, and it's littered with obstacles that'll test your reflexes. These aren't your garden-variety hurdles either. We're talking devious blocks and tricky movers that'll have you plotting your moves like a grandmaster.

Platforms are the game's backbone – they come in all shapes and sizes, from rock-steady to those sneaky vanishing ones. It isn't just a test of skill: it's also a visual feast with eye-popping colors that'll keep your eyeballs glued to the screen.

As you level up, the game throws down the gauntlet with even crazier challenges. It's a perfect blend of skill, strategy, and speed. You have to stay sharp, think fast, and adapt. And the satisfaction of nailing that perfect run? Unbeatable.

Controls in this ball jumping game are slick and intuitive. You won't be fumbling around: it's all smooth sailing so that you can focus on the action. What about audio? The game's tunes and sound effects are on point, keeping you pumped as you blaze through the levels.

In a nutshell, Go Escape is a beast of a ball game. It's packed with mind-blowing levels, heart-pounding challenges, and straight-up eye candy visuals. This game is your next obsession if you're all about that high-octane, brain-twisting, platform-hopping action. Get ready to bounce your way to glory!
game_info.description: Neon Bounce Escape is a high-octane physics platformer where you control a sentient neon sphere trying to escape a digital labyrinth. Master momentum, bounce off specialized surfaces, and navigate treacherous gaps and spikes. Use your reflexes to guide the ball across static, moving, and crumbling platforms to reach the data portal at the end of the level.
game_info.controls:
- ENTER: Start Game
- ESC: Pause / Unpause
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over or Win screens)
- ARROW LEFT: Roll Left
- ARROW RIGHT: Roll Right
- SPACE: Jump
- SHIFT: Brake / Stabilize

TEST_1.test_description: Basic Survival Test. The bot attempts to reach the end of the level by constantly moving right and jumping over obstacles.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The bot simulates holding the Right Arrow key constantly. It uses a raycast-like logic to detect gaps or hazards ahead (spikes) and triggers a Jump (Space) when a threat is imminent. It ignores collectibles.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The bot should progress significantly through the level without falling into pits or hitting spikes immediately. Success is defined by reaching at least 50% of the level distance or reaching the goal.

TEST_2.test_description: Stress Test / Random Input. The bot generates random inputs to test physics stability and collision edge cases.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The bot randomly presses Left, Right, Jump, or Brake keys every few frames. This creates chaotic movement to ensure the ball doesn't clip through walls or get stuck in invalid states.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The game should not crash or hang. The physics engine should resolve all collisions gracefully, even if the player dies frequently. The game state should handle rapid restart requests correctly.
